_comment_1: Optional Claude Code MCP integration for BrainPalace.
_comment_2: Claude Code does NOT read mcpServers from ~/.claude/settings.json. Either save this file as .mcp.json in your project root, or register once with: claude mcp add brainpalace -- brainpalace mcp
_comment_3: NOT enabled by default — the plugin uses skills + slash commands as the primary integration. This snippet is for Claude Code users who specifically want typed MCP tool calls instead.
_comment_4: The plugin's start hook already auto-starts the HTTP server, so --ensure-server is not needed for Claude Code. Non-Claude-Code clients should add it (see docs/MCP_SETUP.md).
